# Demo: Whitepages Pro Integration

![pettern](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20684%20460'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

## Access the Power of Whitepages Pro’s IDV Data in the Sift Console

The Sift Console tells the story behind the data to help you make quick, informed decisions. And now, with our Whitepages Pro integration, you can access third-party identity verification data directly within the Console.

### See the Sift Platform in Action

## Dare to grow differently.

Flip the switch on fraud-fueled fear. Make risk work for your business and scale securely into new markets with Sift’s AI-powered platform.
